title: Master Yi Rank 2 Deck National Open Shanghai

record.title: Master Yi Rank 2 Deck National Open Shanghai

primarySource.label: Shanghai National Open summary page
primarySource.description: Community summary page used as the event source because no official Riot recap is attached yet.

sources.label: Shanghai National Open summary page
sources.description: Community summary page used as the event source because no official Riot recap is attached yet.

eventPrimarySource.label: Shanghai National Open summary page
eventPrimarySource.description: Community summary page used as the event source because no official Riot recap is attached yet.

decklistSource.label: Master Yi decklist
decklistSource.description: Community-linked public deck page used to resolve the full card list for this deck.

resolvedCard.name: Charm
resolvedCard.effect: Move an enemy unit.

resolvedCard.name: Clockwork Keeper
resolvedCard.effect:
You may pay :rb_rune_calm: as an additional cost to play me.
When you play me, if you paid the additional cost, draw 1.

resolvedCard.name: Defy
resolvedCard.effect:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Counter a spell that costs no more than :rb_energy_4: and no more than :rb_rune_rainbow:.

resolvedCard.name: En Garde
resolvedCard.effect:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Give a friendly unit +1 :rb_might: this turn, then an additional +1 :rb_might: this turn if it is the only unit you control there.

resolvedCard.name: Find Your Center
resolvedCard.effect:
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
If an opponent's score is within 3 points of the Victory Score, this costs :rb_energy_2: less.
Draw 1 and channel 1 rune exhausted.

resolvedCard.name: Rune Prison
resolvedCard.effect:
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Stun a unit. (It doesn't deal combat damage this turn.)

resolvedCard.name: Stalwart Poro
resolvedCard.effect: [Shield] (+1 :rb_might: while I'm a defender.)

resolvedCard.name: Discipline
resolvedCard.effect:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Give a unit +2 :rb_might: this turn. Draw 1.

resolvedCard.name: Tasty Faefolk
resolvedCard.effect:
[Accelerate] (You may pay :rb_energy_1::rb_rune_calm: as an additional cost to have me enter ready.)
[Deathknell] — Channel 2 runes exhausted and draw 1. (When I die, get the effect.)

resolvedCard.name: Zhonya's Hourglass
resolvedCard.effect:
[Hidden] (Hide now for :rb_rune_rainbow: to react with later for :rb_energy_0:.)
If a friendly unit would die, kill this instead. Heal that unit, exhaust it, and recall it. (Send it to base. This isn't a move.)

resolvedCard.name: Whiteflame Protector
resolvedCard.effect: When you play me, give a unit +8 :rb_might: this turn.

resolvedCard.name: Confront
resolvedCard.effect:
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Units you play this turn enter ready. Draw 1.

resolvedCard.name: First Mate
resolvedCard.effect: When you play me, ready another unit.

resolvedCard.name: Pit Rookie
resolvedCard.effect: When you play me, buff another friendly unit. (If it doesn't have a buff, it gets a +1 :rb_might: buff.)

resolvedCard.name: Catalyst of Aeons
resolvedCard.effect: Channel 2 runes exhausted. If you couldn't channel 2 runes this way, draw 1.

resolvedCard.name: Unyielding Spirit
resolvedCard.effect:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Prevent all spell and ability damage this turn.

resolvedCard.name: Primal Strength
resolvedCard.effect:
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Give a unit +7 :rb_might: this turn.

resolvedCard.name: Qiyana - Victorious
resolvedCard.effect:
[Deflect] (Opponents must pay :rb_rune_rainbow: to choose me with a spell or ability.)
When I conquer, draw 1 or channel 1 rune exhausted.

resolvedCard.name: Sabotage
resolvedCard.effect: Choose an opponent. They reveal their hand. Choose a non-unit card from it, and recycle that card.

resolvedCard.name: Deadbloom Predator
resolvedCard.effect:
[Deflect] (Opponents must pay :rb_rune_rainbow: to choose me with a spell or ability.)
You may play me to an occupied enemy battlefield.

resolvedCard.name: Grove of the God-Willow
resolvedCard.effect: When you hold here, draw 1.

resolvedCard.name: Obelisk of Power
resolvedCard.effect: At the start of each player's first Beginning Phase, that player channels 1 rune.

resolvedCard.name: Vilemaw's Lair
resolvedCard.effect: Units can't move from here to base.

resolvedCard.name: Master Yi - Honed
resolvedCard.effect:
[Ganking] (I can move from battlefield to battlefield.)
I enter ready.

resolvedCard.name: Master Yi - Wuju Bladesman - Starter
resolvedCard.effect: While a friendly unit defends alone, it gets +2 :rb_might:.

resolvedCard.name: Tasty Faefolk
resolvedCard.effect:
[Accelerate] (You may pay :rb_energy_1::rb_rune_calm: as an additional cost to have me enter ready.)
[Deathknell] — Channel 2 runes exhausted and draw 1. (When I die, get the effect.)

resolvedCard.name: Catalyst of Aeons
resolvedCard.effect: Channel 2 runes exhausted. If you couldn't channel 2 runes this way, draw 1.

resolvedCard.name: Unyielding Spirit
resolvedCard.effect:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Prevent all spell and ability damage this turn.

resolvedCard.name: Primal Strength
resolvedCard.effect:
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Give a unit +7 :rb_might: this turn.

resolvedCard.name: Sabotage
resolvedCard.effect: Choose an opponent. They reveal their hand. Choose a non-unit card from it, and recycle that card.

resolvedCard.name: Deadbloom Predator
resolvedCard.effect:
[Deflect] (Opponents must pay :rb_rune_rainbow: to choose me with a spell or ability.)
You may play me to an occupied enemy battlefield.
